# Dr. Sandeep K. Sahu – Endocrinologist, Cuttack
# SAI SHREE HEALTH CARE — drsandeepkumarsahu.com

> Dr. Sandeep K. Sahu is a DM (Endocrinology) specialist and Assistant Professor at S.C.B. Medical College and Hospital, Cuttack, Odisha, India. He runs SAI SHREE HEALTH CARE clinic at Near Shreema Hospital, Ring Road, Mangalabag, Cuttack – 753001.

## About This Website

This website provides information about:
- Expert endocrinology services in Cuttack, Odisha
- Conditions treated: Diabetes, Thyroid disorders, PCOS/PCOD, Obesity, Growth disorders, Metabolic conditions
- Patient resources, health blog articles, and FAQs
- Appointment booking for SAI SHREE HEALTH CARE
